value.found_quote: | [`dontAsk`](#allow-only-pre-approved-tools-with-dontask-mode)       | Only pre-approved tools                                                                | Locked-down CI and scripts              |
value.rationale: The page lists `dontAsk` as an available permission mode in Claude Code, and explicitly states that what runs without asking in this mode is "Only pre-approved tools," directly matching the claim. The mode is presented as a current available option (set with `--permission-mode dontAsk`), with no indication of deprecation or sunset.
